# source.dianping.com - AI crawl entry points
# Canonical host: https://source.dianping.com

# Primary pages
https://source.dianping.com/
https://source.dianping.com/search
https://source.dianping.com/coupons

https://source.dianping.com/category/food
https://source.dianping.com/category/movie
https://source.dianping.com/category/hotel
